lifecycle.name: DMV & Title
lifecycle.description: Vehicle registration, title transfer, VIN verification, licensing, emissions

lifecycle.name: Permitting
lifecycle.description: Building permits, plan review, zoning, contractor licensing, environmental review

lifecycle.name: Inspections
lifecycle.description: Building, electrical, plumbing, mechanical, fire, structural, health, ADA

lifecycle.name: Recording Services
lifecycle.description: Document recording, deed processing, mortgage, lien, UCC, GIS mapping

lifecycle.name: Operations
lifecycle.description: Cross-department orchestration, fraud detection, revenue, queuing

workers.name: Jurisdiction Onboarding
workers.capabilitySummary: Jurisdiction Onboarding — validates FIPS code, EIN, contact domain, and suite eligibility before provisioning a government tenant

workers.name: Title Registration
workers.capabilitySummary: Title Registration — processes vehicle title transfers, validates VIN integrity, NMVTIS checks, odometer fraud detection, and lienholder verification

workers.name: Vehicle Registration Renewal
workers.capabilitySummary: Vehicle Registration Renewal — processes annual registration renewals, validates emissions compliance, insurance verification, and outstanding violation checks

workers.name: Driver License Issuance
workers.capabilitySummary: Driver License Issuance — processes new and renewal driver license applications, validates identity documents, vision screening, and REAL ID compliance

workers.name: VIN Verification
workers.capabilitySummary: VIN Verification — validates vehicle identification numbers against NHTSA decode, checks for theft records, and verifies physical VIN plate integrity

workers.name: Lien Processing
workers.capabilitySummary: Lien Processing — manages lien filings, releases, and ELT (Electronic Lien and Title) transactions for vehicle titles

workers.name: Emissions Compliance
workers.capabilitySummary: Emissions Compliance — manages vehicle emissions testing records, exemptions, and compliance tracking per Clean Air Act and state programs

workers.name: Dealer Licensing
workers.capabilitySummary: Dealer Licensing — processes new and renewal dealer license applications, validates bond, lot, and insurance requirements

workers.name: Salvage and Rebuilt Title
workers.capabilitySummary: Salvage and Rebuilt Title — processes branded title applications for salvage, rebuilt, and flood-damaged vehicles with enhanced inspection requirements

workers.name: Fleet Registration
workers.capabilitySummary: Fleet Registration — processes bulk vehicle registration for government and commercial fleets, IRP/IFTA compliance, and apportioned plates

workers.name: Commercial Driver License Processing
workers.capabilitySummary: Commercial Driver License Processing — manages CDL applications, endorsements, medical certifications, and FMCSA Drug & Alcohol Clearinghouse checks

workers.name: DMV Correspondence
workers.capabilitySummary: DMV Correspondence — manages automated and manual communications including suspension notices, renewal reminders, and hearing notifications

workers.name: DMV Hearings and Appeals
workers.capabilitySummary: DMV Hearings and Appeals — schedules administrative hearings, tracks evidence submissions, and generates hearing officer decision documents

workers.name: DMV Fraud Detection
workers.capabilitySummary: DMV Fraud Detection — identifies suspicious patterns in title applications, registration renewals, and identity documents to flag potential fraud for investigation

workers.name: DMV Revenue Reconciliation
workers.capabilitySummary: DMV Revenue Reconciliation — reconciles daily fee collections, tracks outstanding balances, and generates revenue reports for treasury

workers.name: DMV Customer Queue Management
workers.capabilitySummary: DMV Customer Queue Management — manages appointment scheduling, walk-in queues, estimated wait times, and service window routing

workers.name: Permit Intake
workers.capabilitySummary: Permit Intake — validates building/trade permit applications, checks contractor licensing and insurance, enforces zoning and environmental prerequisites

workers.name: Plan Review
workers.capabilitySummary: Plan Review — routes building plans to appropriate review disciplines, tracks review cycles, manages applicant resubmittals, and enforces code compliance checklists

workers.name: Zoning Verification
workers.capabilitySummary: Zoning Verification — validates proposed use against zoning ordinance, checks setbacks, lot coverage, FAR, height limits, and parking requirements

workers.name: Contractor License Verification
workers.capabilitySummary: Contractor License Verification — validates contractor licensing status, classification, bond, workers compensation, and insurance before permit issuance

workers.name: Fire Prevention Review
workers.capabilitySummary: Fire Prevention Review — reviews building plans and permit applications for fire code compliance including sprinkler, alarm, egress, and fire separation requirements

workers.name: Environmental Review
workers.capabilitySummary: Environmental Review — manages NEPA/CEQA/SEPA compliance, wetland delineation, stormwater management, and endangered species consultation for development permits

workers.name: Variance and Conditional Use Permit Processing
workers.capabilitySummary: Variance and Conditional Use Permit Processing — manages applications for zoning variances, conditional/special use permits, and administrative adjustments

workers.name: Subdivision Review
workers.capabilitySummary: Subdivision Review — reviews and processes preliminary and final plat applications, lot configurations, infrastructure dedications, and improvement agreements

workers.name: Impact Fee Calculation
workers.capabilitySummary: Impact Fee Calculation — calculates development impact fees for transportation, parks, schools, fire, and utility infrastructure based on project scope and land use

workers.name: Code Enforcement
workers.capabilitySummary: Code Enforcement — manages property maintenance complaints, violation investigations, notice and order issuance, abatement tracking, and compliance monitoring

workers.name: Certificate of Occupancy
workers.capabilitySummary: Certificate of Occupancy — validates all final inspections, fire sign-offs, utility connections, and as-built conditions before issuing occupancy authorization

workers.name: Sign Permit
workers.capabilitySummary: Sign Permit — processes sign permit applications, validates sign code compliance including size, height, illumination, and location restrictions

workers.name: Demolition Permit
workers.capabilitySummary: Demolition Permit — processes demolition permit applications, verifies asbestos surveys, utility disconnections, historic review, and OSHA compliance

workers.name: Grading and Excavation Permit
workers.capabilitySummary: Grading and Excavation Permit — processes earthwork permits, validates erosion control plans, geotechnical reports, and stormwater management requirements

workers.name: Right-of-Way Encroachment
workers.capabilitySummary: Right-of-Way Encroachment — processes encroachment permits for work within public rights-of-way including utility cuts, sidewalk repairs, and temporary street closures

workers.name: Building Inspector
workers.capabilitySummary: Building Inspector — manages field inspections, enforces code compliance, escalates life-safety violations, and validates GPS-verified site presence

workers.name: Electrical Inspector
workers.capabilitySummary: Electrical Inspector — conducts electrical system inspections for NEC compliance, verifies panel sizing, grounding, GFCI/AFCI protection, and load calculations

workers.name: Plumbing Inspector
workers.capabilitySummary: Plumbing Inspector — inspects plumbing installations for UPC/IPC compliance including DWV systems, water supply, backflow prevention, and fixture counts

workers.name: Mechanical/HVAC Inspector
workers.capabilitySummary: Mechanical/HVAC Inspector — inspects heating, ventilation, and air conditioning installations for IMC compliance, refrigerant handling, ductwork, and combustion air

workers.name: Fire Inspector
workers.capabilitySummary: Fire Inspector — conducts fire safety inspections, validates sprinkler and alarm systems, verifies egress compliance, and enforces IFC occupancy limits

workers.name: Structural Inspector
workers.capabilitySummary: Structural Inspector — inspects foundation, framing, and structural systems for compliance with IBC structural provisions, engineered plans, and special inspection requirements

workers.name: Elevator Inspector
workers.capabilitySummary: Elevator Inspector — inspects elevators, escalators, and conveyances for ASME A17.1 compliance, annual certifications, and safety device testing

workers.name: Health and Food Safety Inspector
workers.capabilitySummary: Health and Food Safety Inspector — conducts food establishment inspections, validates temperature controls, sanitation, and FDA Food Code compliance

workers.name: ADA and Accessibility Inspector
workers.capabilitySummary: ADA and Accessibility Inspector — verifies compliance with ADA, ABA, Fair Housing Act, and ICC A117.1 accessibility standards for new construction and alterations

workers.name: Environmental Compliance Inspector
workers.capabilitySummary: Environmental Compliance Inspector — inspects construction sites for erosion control, stormwater BMP maintenance, dust control, and NPDES permit compliance

workers.name: Document Recording
workers.capabilitySummary: Document Recording — validates and records deeds, mortgages, liens, and other instruments against the official land record with hash integrity and notarization verification

workers.name: Deed Processing
workers.capabilitySummary: Deed Processing — validates and records warranty deeds, quitclaim deeds, and special purpose deeds with chain-of-title verification and transfer tax assessment

workers.name: Mortgage and Deed of Trust Recording
workers.capabilitySummary: Mortgage and Deed of Trust Recording — records mortgage instruments, assignments, modifications, and subordination agreements with lien priority tracking

workers.name: Lien Filing
workers.capabilitySummary: Lien Filing — records mechanic's liens, tax liens, judgment liens, and HOA liens with statutory deadline tracking and proper notice verification

workers.name: UCC Filing
workers.capabilitySummary: UCC Filing — processes Uniform Commercial Code financing statements, amendments, continuations, and terminations for secured transactions

workers.name: Plat and Map Recording
workers.capabilitySummary: Plat and Map Recording — records subdivision plats, lot line adjustments, parcel maps, and condominium plans with surveyor certification and planning approval verification

workers.name: Vital Records
workers.capabilitySummary: Vital Records — manages birth certificates, death certificates, marriage licenses, and domestic partnership registrations with identity verification and fraud prevention

workers.name: Notary Administration
workers.capabilitySummary: Notary Administration — manages notary public commissions, notary journal audits, RON provider registrations, and notary complaint investigations

workers.name: eRecording Gateway
workers.capabilitySummary: eRecording Gateway — manages electronic recording submissions from title companies and law firms via PRIA/URPERA standards, validates digital signatures and document formatting

workers.name: Title Search
workers.capabilitySummary: Title Search — conducts grantor/grantee index searches, builds chain of title, identifies encumbrances, and generates title abstracts from recorded documents

workers.name: Easement and Right-of-Way Recording
workers.capabilitySummary: Easement and Right-of-Way Recording — records easement grants, dedications, vacations, and utility easements with beneficiary and burdened parcel tracking

workers.name: Lis Pendens and Court Orders
workers.capabilitySummary: Lis Pendens and Court Orders — records notices of pending litigation, court-ordered transfers, foreclosure notices, and abstracts of judgment against real property

workers.name: Tax Lien and Assessment Recording
workers.capabilitySummary: Tax Lien and Assessment Recording — records property tax liens, special assessment liens, and tax sale certificates with statutory notice compliance

workers.name: Redaction and Privacy
workers.capabilitySummary: Redaction and Privacy — manages PII redaction requests, SSN/DOB removal from recorded documents, and address confidentiality program compliance

workers.name: GIS and Parcel Mapping
workers.capabilitySummary: GIS and Parcel Mapping — maintains parcel boundary data, processes splits and merges, updates GIS layers from recorded plats, and manages spatial data integrity

workers.name: Document Preservation and Digitization
workers.capabilitySummary: Document Preservation and Digitization — manages document scanning, indexing, microfilm/digital conversion, and long-term archival of recorded instruments

workers.name: Alex Government Chief of Staff
workers.capabilitySummary: Alex Government Chief of Staff — orchestrates cross-suite workflows, manages inter-department handoffs, tracks SLA compliance, and provides jurisdiction-wide analytics
